content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1558: Rampage to Break the Challenge! Translator: Sigma_ Editor: SSins

Zhen Ru skeptically observed Shi Yan who didn’t have an energy fluctuation of a living creature. Although Shi Yan was sitting right in front of her, she had a strange feeling that he was very far away.

Waves of space energy rippled and separated her and Shi Yan. She suddenly found that the strange worms she had sent to Shi Yan’s Sea of Consciousness slowly lost the connection with her.

At first, she thought it was the magnificent power of the Space power Upanishad and the barrier and seal had hindered her Soul Consciousness.

However, as time flew, she became restless.

She had an insecure feeling and she didn’t know why. She found that something was wrong and the situation was getting out of her control.

Deep in Shi Yan’s soul altar...

It was a vast sea of stars or a brand new universe with thick life energy hovering above Shi Yan’s Sea of Consciousness. This universe had so many stars and each star had thick earth and heaven energy. Together, they had created a bright but mysterious, magnificent picture.

In a corner of that bright starry sky, the arm-sized worms were chewing off a massive planet.

Strangely, the pollutants the worms produced could affect this territory too.

Shi Yan’s host soul was the master of that territory. Because of the intruded Sea of Consciousness, his soul power and Soul Consciousness were controlled. It seemed like he couldn’t manage his territory anymore.

A bright star was polluted and nibbled. Shortly after, those worms reproduced fast. Their population was now an enormous number.

The situation turned more deadly!

All of a sudden, a dazzling light shot out and thrusted into that territory!

Shi Yan’s territory changed amazingly after that!

He had slaughtered the experts of the four clans to refine the pure energy. At first, wisps of energy scattered in every corner of the territory. However, at this moment, all of them began to gather as if they received the same call. Wisps of energy turned into jets of bright light and merged with that column of light.

That light column seemed to have a magical life. Shortly after, it became so fierce that it changed the situation of his territory.

Boom!

The strong light powerfully shot over, covered the worms and the entire chipped planet. Inside the powerful light, those worms weren’t killed. They twisted and transformed.

At the same time, a Soul Seal detached from Shi Yan’s host soul.

Strange things happened within that light. The worms Zhen Ru had released were transforming into creatures!

They had transformed into a group of little people with Shi Yan’s imprint. They had spikes and scale armor covered their bodies.

Although they looked different, they all had the same strength. From a closer look, they looked eighty percent similar to Shi Yan in his Absolute Beginning body.

They were a new species!

The seal that Zhen Ru had left in their lives were erased shortly.

The strong light shot from the territory and shone in his Sea of Consciousness. Billions of worms in the Sea of consciousness were like ice under water. They were dissolved in just a blink of an eye.

The creatures polluting Shi Yan’s soul altar were obliterated within a split second.

Boom!

The fierce light from Shi Yan’s territory exploded and sentcountless light dots to his territory and through Shi Yan’s acupuncture points, overflowing his sealed body from the acupuncture points.

The mutant Pure Gold Spirit Ant spread in every corner of his body and the contaminants in his Sea of Consciousness were burned into ashes.

Sizzle! Sizzle!

Shi Yan’s body fumed thick smokes as if he was burned. His stiff body twitched in the smoke.

Zhen Ru’s soft body staggered. She had to back off continuously. The frigid ice of the secret chamber boomed and cracked. The entire secret chamber was collapsed.

She was terrified, her calm and confident face vanishing. She realized that she had lost connection with the creatures she had bred and nurtured for a long time.

She had fed Pure Gold Spirit Ants and the strange worms with her blood and aura. Thus, they had Myriad Shape Tribe’s supernatural abilities.

The rare creatures that could resist even the Devouring power Upanishad were all unknowingly dead. As their master, she was damaged badly. She now knew that she shouldn’t disdain Shi Yan.

Boop! Boop! Boop!

Waves of space energy exploded. The sharp space blades pierced through the area and cut off the entire land.

The palaces above the chamber collapsed grumblingly. Many members of the Phantom Clan screamed and ran away. Looking at the deep hole in the ground, they yelled in panic.

“Slut! Die!”

Countless starlight beams congregated in thick smoke. A brilliant galaxy emerged above Shi Yan’s head.

Shi Yan didn’t turn into his Absolute Beginning body yet. He pointed at Zhen Ru at a corner of the collapsed space. The eight islands of the eight evil power Upanishads stormed toward Zhen Ru in the rolling blood sea. At the same time, Shi Yan’s severely wounded body healed with thick life energy. The cracks on his body mended and recovered shortly.

The power of Life power Upanishad was built on the foundation of the Immortal Demon Blood. He could use Life power Upanishad to regrow his bones, veins, and even blood. At the ultimate level, his energy would never run out and his body was undying.

“You dared to destroy my Pure Gold Spirit Ants! Even if I can’t drink your blood, I have to destroy you!”

Zhen Ru’s slender body retreated like a willow catkin. After a flash, she disappears out of the collapsed space and moved to the outside of the Phantom Clan.

“You dare to cause trouble in the Phantom Clan. You don’t treasure your life, do you? I want to see how Montecie kills you!” Shi Yan laughed savagely.

Turning into a jet of starlight, he left the icy chamber to the Phantom Clan’s vast territory.

Strangely, Shi Yan realized that there weren’t many Phantom Clan fellows in this area. The Phantom Clan fellows scattered away. They didn’t look like they wanted to attack Zhen Ru.

He thought that something was wrong.

“Montecie? She can’t help you. I control the Phantom Clan now!” Cantecie’s voice arose from a palace far from him. As her voice subsided, she appeared by Shi Yan and Zhen Ru inside a twisted tornado. “Fan De Lei is imprisoning your Mei Ji. Oh, I forgot to tell you that Fan De Lei has a deep love with Mei Ji. He doesn’t mind that she’s been with you for a long time.”

Hearing her, Shi Yan became restless and hot-tempered. Flows of murderous aura fumed from him like dragon blood, his eyes bloodshot.

The eight gory islands soared furiously from the ground and attacked Cantecie and Zhen Ru. The Death, Soul Control, Destruction, and more released torrential evil auras under his evil energy urge. The negative energies bombarded their souls and ran directly into Zhen Ru’s and Cantecie’s head!

“Boom! Boom! Boom!”

The bloody islands barged into the tornadoes. Cantecie’s eyes shot magical light and used her power Upanishad to resist.

Zhen Ru disappeared ghostly as if she had already left. However, her aura remained at the site.

She used Myriad Shape Tribe’s innate abilities to hide nearby. She had camouflaged her soul, body, and aura, which was going to be very hard to distinguish her.

The eight islands were the source of power Upanishad inheritances in the Bloodthirsty Force’s holy land. Pu Tai had refined them. When Shi Yan swallowed Pu Tai, he got them all. They had become a wonder in his territory.

These eight towers of inheritance could produce power that wasn’t less than a divine weapon in cooperation with the evil power Upanishad.

Also, after he had killed so many members of the four clans, he got a lot of energy together with negative emotions accumulated in his acupuncture points. At this moment, all of the negative energies in his acupuncture points were activated and overflowing to the eight islands. Shortly, the islands’ energy rocketed; they could destroy real matters and erode people’s soul.

They became superb!

Cantecie used the tornadoes from her Wind power Upanishad to resist the eight islands. At Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, she wasn’t in a disadvantageous situation.

However, countless wisps of negative energies had intruded, bringing resentful, desperate, fearful, restless, and bloodthirsty feelings to attack her soul altar. She couldn’t stand them. She had to use the soul energy in the soul pond to create a defense, stopping the attack that was aimed at her soul.

Thus, she didn’t gain the upper hand, either.

“So powerful! I’m afraid this is the power of Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm!” Cantecie was startled. She pulled herself together and used her soul to sense. Soon, she found that the aura on Shi Yan’s body was so marvelous that she couldn’t measure how strong he actually was.

“He’s stuck at the challenge to enter Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm! It’s strange. In this circumstance, people would try to break through rather than join a battle. And he’s currently fighting against us; he can break through in any minute! Damn! My creatures helped him evolve his territory!”

Zhen Ru’s worried screaming came to Cantecie’s soul, which shook her hard.

Was he breaking through now?

She contemplated, her eyes drilling into Shi Yan. Then, she suddenly got it. She knew that Zhen Ru was correct. She couldn’t know his realm because he was in the middle of his progress to enter Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm from First Sky. In this stage, his realm wasn’t stable.

“You lure him. I’m going to hit him fatally!” Zhen Ru’s voice arose in Cantecie’s head one again. “Provoke him! Make him lose his mind. Make him restless and hot-tempered. He will fall into bedevilment. Let alone breaking through, he will explode!”

Cantecie’s eyes brightened. She sighed as Zhen Ru’s plan was so sinister. “Fan De Lei is confining Mei Ji. I asked him not to act rashly. You have Skyfall Star River, which should belong to him. His rage can blind him. I’m not sure if he does something immortal.”

Cantecie knew Fan De Lei didn’t dare to act rashly. However, if it was to enrage Shi Yan, she had to say so.

“RRRROOOAARR!”

Shi Yan completely exploded. He swelled up into his giant Absolute Beginning body. A towering giant appeared and stomped on a palace.

“Get out!” The entire world was filled with his earth-shaking bellow.

Sizzle! Sizzle! Sizzle!

Starlight bloomed in that palace. Meteors shot everywhere. Fan De Lei had to sway out of the place helter-skelter. Now, he looked at Cantecie with hidden resentment.
